data.content: Root cause update: parent-scene prompt told agents to stop a child after one claim/completion cycle, which strands multi-step workflows (e.g. ready_for_implementation_review/implementation_review) instead of reaching shipped. Fix: Knots parent-mode prompt now requires repeating claim->execute->completion until each child is terminal (shipped/abandoned), with explicit active-state recovery via kno next before resuming the loop. Added regression assertions in knots-backend coverage tests. Validation: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Integrated on main and pushed to origin/main as 6483427.
